message:
feat(cli): wire cursor-based event streaming into robot events command

Adds --cursor and --replay-limit CLI args to the robot events subcommand,
enabling deterministic event replay from checkpoint IDs via the
get_events_stream() storage API added in the previous commit.

- Validates cursor >= 0 with proper ROBOT_ERR_INVALID_ARGS error
- Dispatches to EventStreamQuery when cursor is present, falling back
  to the existing EventQuery path otherwise
- RobotEventsData response includes cursor, next_cursor, replay_limit,
  and order fields for client pagination

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
